title: Payment status chip
description: Colour-coded chip for payment_intent.status (initialized / requires_action / requires_payment_method / requires_confirmation / requires_capture / processing / succeeded / cancelled / failed) or payment implicit status (succeeded / partially_refunded / fully_refunded / disputed) or provider status (active / inactive).

children.$expr: props.status === 'succeeded' ? 'Succeeded' : (props.status === 'active' ? 'Active' : (props.status === 'inactive' ? 'Inactive' : (props.status === 'failed' ? 'Failed' : (props.status === 'cancelled' ? 'Cancelled' : (props.status === 'initialized' ? 'Initialized' : (props.status === 'requires_action' ? 'Verification needed' : (props.status === 'requires_payment_method' ? 'Awaiting method' : (props.status === 'requires_confirmation' ? 'Awaiting confirm' : (props.status === 'requires_capture' ? 'Ready to capture' : (props.status === 'processing' ? 'Processing' : (props.status === 'partially_refunded' ? 'Partially refunded' : (props.status === 'fully_refunded' ? 'Fully refunded' : (props.status === 'disputed' ? 'Disputed' : props.status))))))))))))))
